scripts.dev: npm run config:sync && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:WATCHFILES_FORCE_POLLING='1'; Set-Location apps/api; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --reload-include '.env' --port 8000"
